parameters.query:
select * from mes.applemfi a
where a.status =2 and a.retroid ='{{ $json.sn }}'

nodes.name: 查询上一道工序是否完成

parameters.query:
WITH latest_history AS (
    -- 先选择最新的记录并展开数组
    SELECT json_array_elements_text(procedure_detail_id->'procedure_detail_id')::int AS detail_id
    FROM mes.history_procedure_list
    WHERE history_procedure_list_id = (
        -- 获取最新记录的 id
        SELECT history_procedure_list_id
        FROM mes.history_procedure_list
        WHERE procedure_list_id = '{{ $json.procedure_list_id }}' AND status = 1
        ORDER BY createtime DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
)
SELECT hpd.*
FROM mes.history_procedure_detail hpd
WHERE hpd.procedure_detail_id IN (
    SELECT detail_id FROM latest_history
)
AND hpd.procedure_dataupload = 2;

SELECT 
       r.retroid_id,
       jo.joborder_number,
       pm.product_model_name,
       pi.product_code,
       jo.procedure_list_id
FROM mes.retroid r
JOIN mes.retroid_generate rg ON r.retroid_generate_id = rg.retroid_generate_id
JOIN mes.joborder jo ON rg.joborder_id = jo.joborder_id
JOIN mes.product_info pi ON jo.product_id = pi.product_id
JOIN mes.product_model pm ON pi.product_model_id = pm.product_model_id
WHERE r.retroid = '{{ $json.retroid }}';  -- 替换成你要查询的 retroid

main.node: 查询上一道工序是否完成
